biological_replicate: 30 4- to 6-week-old male nude mice were allocated to six groups...
technical_replicate: the cells were transfected with the appropriate siRNAs using Lipofectamine 3000, and scrambled siRNA was used as a control.
experimental_design: Thirty 4- to 6-week-old male nude mice were allocated to six groups of five mice each.
factor_value: treatment (OTUD5 KD, TRIM25 KD, PML KD, OTUD5/TRIM25 KD, TRIM25/PML KD)
Each mouse received 106 cells of the control-infected or gene-KD Hep3B cells (OTUD5 KD, TRIM25 KD, PML KD, OTUD5/TRIM25 KD, or TRIM25/PML KD).
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
